I'm playing a bard in the 5th edition Curse of Strahd module. I am also controlling an NPC druid. My fellow player plays a warlock and controls an NPC wizard. There are only the two of us playing. My wife is the DM (she really doesn't like to DM), and she told me we will probably face Strahd when we play tonight (the big final battle). So, in a party like ours (bard, druid, wizard, warlock) what types of spells would be best for a 10th level bard when fighting an enemy like Strahd.
